title: verbascum aureum
intro: Verbascum aureum, also known as Golden Mullein, is a biennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its yellow flowers and velvety leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Golden Mullein include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
